instructions.instruction: If required inputs (concept document, tech stack, project name) are missing, ask for them before proceeding.
instructions.original_snippets: If the user hasn't specified these, ask for them before proceeding.
instructions.relevant_when: When the user provides an incomplete kickoff request

instructions.instruction: Stop immediately and report the specific error if a required condition is not met (file missing, unreadable, invalid stack).
instructions.original_snippets: if a required condition is not met (file missing, unreadable, invalid stack, etc.), stop immediately and report the specific error to the user. Do not attempt to continue
instructions.relevant_when: When validating inputs and one is invalid or missing

instructions.instruction: Confirm the target directory doesn't already contain a git repo, warn and ask for confirmation before proceeding if it does.
instructions.original_snippets: Confirm the target directory doesn't already contain a git repo. If it does, warn the user and ask for confirmation before proceeding.
instructions.relevant_when: When target directory is an existing git repo

instructions.instruction: Read references/stacks/<stack>/README.md for exact directory tree and create all directories listed, using .gitkeep for empty ones.
instructions.original_snippets:
Read references/stacks/<stack>/README.md for the exact directory tree.
Create all directories listed in the structure. Create .gitkeep files in empty directories
instructions.relevant_when: When scaffolding the project directory structure

instructions.instruction: Copy and adapt template files from references/stacks/<stack>/, replacing {{PROJECT_NAME}} and {{PROJECT_DESCRIPTION}}.
instructions.original_snippets:
For each template file in references/stacks/<stack>/:
1. Read the template file
2. Replace all {{PLACEHOLDER}} values
instructions.relevant_when: When populating stack template files

instructions.instruction: Copy common files mcp.json to .mcp.json and AGENTS.md to AGENTS.md from references/common/.
instructions.original_snippets:
Also copy common files from references/common/:
- `mcp.json` → `.mcp.json`
- `AGENTS.md` → `AGENTS.md`
instructions.relevant_when: When copying files into the new project

instructions.instruction: Generate OpenSpec config from template, replacing placeholders including {{CONCEPT_SUMMARY}} and {{ARCHITECTURE_SUMMARY}}.
instructions.original_snippets:
Read the OpenSpec config template at references/stacks/<stack>/openspec-config.yaml.
Replace placeholders... Write to openspec/config.yaml.
instructions.relevant_when: When generating OpenSpec configuration

instructions.instruction: Copy CLAUDE.md template from stack references to the project root.
instructions.original_snippets:
Read the CLAUDE.md template at references/stacks/<stack>/CLAUDE.md.
Copy it to the project root as CLAUDE.md.
instructions.relevant_when: When setting up agent instructions

instructions.instruction: Run openspec init --tools claude,antigravity (or --tools all if requested) and confirm success.
instructions.original_snippets:
Run OpenSpec initialization to set up the project with agent tooling:
openspec init --tools claude,antigravity
instructions.relevant_when: When initializing OpenSpec

instructions.instruction: Copy the concept document to openspec/concept.md.
instructions.original_snippets: Copy the concept document to openspec/concept.md.
instructions.relevant_when: When organizing input documents in the repo

instructions.instruction: Copy datamodel to DATAMODEL.md and architecture to ARCHITECTURE.md in root, if provided.
instructions.original_snippets: If a datamodel document was provided, copy it to DATAMODEL.md in the project root... If an architecture document was provided, copy it to ARCHITECTURE.md in the project root.
instructions.relevant_when: When input includes optional data model or architecture documents

instructions.instruction: Generate openspec/roadmap.md based on template in references/common/roadmap-template.md with 3-5 phases.
instructions.original_snippets:
create openspec/roadmap.md based on the template at references/common/roadmap-template.md.
- Phased implementation plan (3-5 phases)
instructions.relevant_when: When creating the implementation roadmap

instructions.instruction: Roadmap should use checkbox format: - [ ] `change-name` — description.
instructions.original_snippets: Use checkbox format: - [ ] `change-name` — description
instructions.relevant_when: When formatting the roadmap items

instructions.instruction: Create OpenSpec changes for EVERY change listed in the roadmap using openspec new change.
instructions.original_snippets:
create OpenSpec changes for every change listed in the roadmap — across all phases, not just Phase 1.
openspec new change "<change-name>"
instructions.relevant_when: When setting up changes directory

instructions.instruction: Generate proposal.md for each change with specific structure: Why, What Changes, Capabilities, Impact.
instructions.original_snippets:
create the proposal.md artifact for each change... The proposal.md for each change should follow this structure:
## Why... ## What Changes... ## Capabilities... ## Impact
instructions.relevant_when: When creating the proposal for each openspec change

instructions.instruction: Phase 1 changes should be foundation and data-model.
instructions.original_snippets:
Standard starting changes (Phase 1):
1. foundation ... 2. data-model
instructions.relevant_when: When establishing the initial roadmap phases

instructions.instruction: Create README.md with project name, tech stack summary, getting started, project structure, and links to concept/roadmap.
instructions.original_snippets:
Create README.md with:
- Project name and description...
- Link to openspec/concept.md... Link to openspec/roadmap.md
instructions.relevant_when: When generating the project README

instructions.instruction: Create TESTING.md adapted to the stack including commands, conventions, E2E, DB strategy.
instructions.original_snippets: Create TESTING.md adapted to the stack...
instructions.relevant_when: When documenting testing strategies

instructions.instruction: Create initial commit with message 'feat: initialize <project-name> with spec-driven configuration'.
instructions.original_snippets: git commit -m "feat: initialize <project-name> with spec-driven configuration"
instructions.relevant_when: When finalizing the kickoff via git

instructions.instruction: Do not install dependencies during kickoff, just tell user to run install commands.
instructions.original_snippets: Don't install dependencies during kickoff — only create config files. Tell the user to run install commands after.
instructions.relevant_when: During overall execution of project setup

instructions.instruction: Only create proposal artifacts for changes initially, not specs or tasks.
instructions.original_snippets: Only create proposals — for initial changes, only create the proposal.md artifact. Specs, design, and tasks are created later
instructions.relevant_when: When iterating over openspec changes and instructions
